title: Red Hat Security Advisory: webkitgtk4 security update
overview:
An update for webkitgtk4 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 Extended Lifecycle Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server (v. 7 ELS)

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: webkitgtk4 security update

An update for webkitgtk4 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 Extended Lifecycle Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for webkitgtk4 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 Extended Lifecycle Support.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
webkitgtk4-2.50.1-1.el7_9.src.rpm
webkitgtk4-2.50.1-1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
webkitgtk4-debuginfo-2.50.1-1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
webkitgtk4-devel-2.50.1-1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
webkitgtk4-doc-2.50.1-1.el7_9.noarch.rpm
webkitgtk4-jsc-2.50.1-1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
webkitgtk4-jsc-devel-2.50.1-1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm
webkitgtk4-2.50.1-1.el7_9.s390x.rpm
webkitgtk4-debuginfo-2.50.1-1.el7_9.s390x.rpm
webkitgtk4-devel-2.50.1-1.el7_9.s390x.rpm
webkitgtk4-jsc-2.50.1-1.el7_9.s390x.rpm
webkitgtk4-jsc-devel-2.50.1-1.el7_9.s390x.rpm
webkitgtk4-2.50.1-1.el7_9.ppc64le.rpm
webkitgtk4-debuginfo-2.50.1-1.el7_9.ppc64le.rpm
webkitgtk4-devel-2.50.1-1.el7_9.ppc64le.rpm
webkitgtk4-jsc-2.50.1-1.el7_9.ppc64le.rpm
webkitgtk4-jsc-devel-2.50.1-1.el7_9.ppc64le.rpm

CVE-2025-43343: A flaw was found in WebKitGTK. Processing malicious web content can cause an unexpected process crash due to improper memory handling.
